title: Operational Bulletins 2011 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2011
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 373 – December 30, 2011 (Expired) Excessive Demand Cost Threshold for 2012
- OB 368 – December 30, 2011 (Expired) Centralized Intake of Applications for the Canadian Experience Class
- OB 371 – December 19, 2011 (Expired) Syria Voluntary Evacuation Procedures
- OB 370 – December 15, 2011 Live-in Caregiver Class – Issuance of open work permits prior to eligibility determination as a member of the Live-in Caregiver Class
- OB 365 – December 6, 2011 (Expired) Economic Class Applications from Venezuela – Transfer from Caracas to Mexico City
- OB 291 – December 5, 2011 (Modified) (Expired) Transfer of Visa Services from Abidjan, Ivory Coast to Dakar, Senegal
- OB 352 – December 1, 2011 Ending the printing and mailing of application forms and instruction guides (kits)
- OB 348 – December 1, 2011 (Modified) Elimination of Counterfoils for Approved Permanent Residence Applicants from Visa-Exempt Countries
- OB 357 – December 1, 2011 (Expired) Parents and Grandparents Extended Stay Temporary Resident Visa ( Super Visa ) and Authorized Period of Extended Stay
- OB 360 – November 18, 2011 Entrepreneur Terms and Conditions
- OB 299-B – November 15, 2011 Return of incomplete Permanent Resident Card Applications
- OB 348 – November 14, 2011 Elimination of Counterfoils for Approved Permanent Residence Applicants from Visa-Exempt Countries

- OB 354 – November 2, 2011 Photo/Data Error Correction for the Confirmation of Permanent Resident Document
- OB 347 – October 7, 2011 Repeal of the Source Country Class of Humanitarian-protected Persons Abroad

- OB 225-D – September 30, 2011 (Expired) Modified processing instructions for Information Technology work permit applications (software pilot) for British Columbia and Quebec
- OB 346 – September 19, 2011 (Expired) Temporary Foreign Worker Program—Intra-company transferees—Recaptured time
- OB 339 – September 15, 2011 (Expired) Change to the Custodianship Requirement for Minor Students
- OB 345 – September 6, 2011 (Expired) Extension of Haiti Special Measures for Work Permits
- OB 340 – August 19, 2011 (Expired) Mandatory Referral to Canadian Public Health Authorities for Complex Pulmonary Tuberculosis-Inactive and other Non-infectious Communicable Diseases Cases
- OB 341 – August 17, 2011 (Modified) Procedures for Requesting Police Certificates from Non-Singapore Citizens

- OB 342 – August 12, 2011 (Expired) Implementation of the Canada-Colombia Free Trade Agreement
- OB 343 – August 9, 2011 Special Events – Visa Fee Exempt Special Events: September and October 2011

- OB 317-B – July 29, 2011 Coming Into Force of Bill C-35, An Act to Amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (Authorized Representatives)
- OB 332– July 29, 2011 (Expired) National Language Instruction for Newcomers to Canada (LINC) Childminding Requirements – Provisions for Labour Market Access Participants
- OB 331– July 29, 2011 (Expired) National Language Instruction for Newcomers to Canada (LINC) Childminding Requirements – Tuberculosis Tests for LINC Childminding Staff and Volunteers
- OB 330 – July 29, 2011 (Expired) National Language Instruction for Newcomers to Canada (LINC) Childminding Requirements – Provision for Physical Activity Space
- OB 329 – July 27, 2011 2 Dimension Bar Coded Temporary Resident Visa, Study Permit and Work Permit Applications

- OB 281 – March 15, 2011 Special Events—Visa Fee Exempt: March 2011
- OB 244-B – February 25, 2011 (Expired) Amendment to Operational Bulletin 244—Amendments to the Citizenship Regulations and Updated Guidelines Regarding the Citizenship Test

- OB 271 – February 9, 2011 Special Events—Visa Fee Exempt Special Events: February and March 2011

- OB 265 – January 21, 2011 (Expired) Interim Procedures for E-Mail Communication with Clients
- OB 264 – January 19, 2011 (Expired) Partial Reinstatement of Haiti Special Measures for Work Permits
- OB 261 – January 14, 2011 Special Events – Visa Fee-Exempt Special Events: January and February 2011
- OB 260 – January 5, 2011 Revised Salaries for IT Workers Under the Software Development Pilot (SDP) Destined to British Columbia or Quebec
